title: What Corporate Predator Calls Mercy
dramatic_function: converts harm into policy and profit language

dialogue_grammar.speech_pattern: renames obvious harm into language calm enough for a meeting

narrative_payoff.resolution: hidden records become visible enough that euphemism stops working

opening_image: A glass wall promises transparency while hiding exactly the right thing.
sample_lines: This will read better in the official report.
You are confusing fear with pattern recognition.
hooks: By the time the hero understands the villain's logic, the villain has already made that logic feel normal.
The villain does not want to win a fight. They want to redefine what counts as winning.
The villain does not want to win a fight. They want to redefine what counts as winning.
